description_long: This is a robust wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, reinforced by four thick, dark metal hoops evenly spaced along its body. The wood staves are vertically aligned, featuring a natural grain pattern and a medium brown color, giving the barrel a classic, rustic appearance. The top and bottom are flat and made of the same wood, with the top surface slightly recessed within the rim. One side of the barrel has a small, round spigot or tap, suggesting it is designed to dispense liquids. The metal bands are matte and slightly faceted, providing structural integrity and a visually striking contrast to the wood. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor or semi-industrial urban environments.
description: A sturdy wooden barrel with dark metal hoops and a small spigot, featuring a classic rustic design and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from a slightly angled side, showing three metal hoops and the wooden top, with no spigot visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the small spigot protruding from the center, with the metal hoops and wood grain clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the barrel is shown, with the spigot barely visible on the left edge and the metal hoops prominent.
description_view_3: A clean side view of the barrel with no spigot visible, emphasizing the symmetry of the metal hoops and wood staves.
